name: FullCalendar Core

en.when_to_use: FullCalendar would normally be the choice instead of a hand-written implementation when you need month/week/day views, overlapping-event layout, and schedule-dragging geometry, because native implementations fail at cross-view date calculations, event stacking, and hit testing, but the exact current upstream package cannot render directly.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot produce a complete calendar's time-zone date calculations, overlapping-interval layout, multi-view switching, and reliable dragging geometry by default; however, @fullcalendar/core@7.0.1 is only a types/shared-contract package and cannot deliver these capabilities by itself.

data_in.note: This is the minimal schedule contract a future renderable wrapper should accept; @fullcalendar/core@7.0.1 itself has no mount API, so do not mistake this schema for runnable input.

events.id?: string -- a future wrapper generates a stable id by default
events.title: string
events.end?: ISO-8601 date/time string -- treated as a point event by the future view by default
events.allDay?: boolean -- inferred by default from whether the date string contains a time
events.url?: absolute URL string -- no navigation by default
events.backgroundColor?: CSS color string -- default theme color
events.borderColor?: CSS color string -- follows backgroundColor by default
events.textColor?: CSS color string -- default theme contrast color

when_to_use: 需要月/周/日多视图、重叠事件布局和日程拖拽几何时本应使用 FullCalendar 而非手写,因为原生在跨视图日期运算、事件堆叠和命中上失败,但当前确切 upstream 包不可直接渲染。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到完整日历的时区日期运算、重叠区间布局、多视图切换和可靠拖拽几何;不过 @fullcalendar/core@7.0.1 仅是类型/共享契约包,不能独立兑现这些能力。

data_in.note: 这是未来可渲染封装应接收的最小日程契约;当前 @fullcalendar/core@7.0.1 本身没有挂载 API,不得把此 schema 误当作可运行输入。

events.id?: string —— 默认由未来封装生成稳定 id
events.title: string
events.end?: ISO-8601 date/time string —— 默认按未来视图的单点事件处理
events.allDay?: boolean —— 默认由日期字符串是否含时间推断
events.url?: absolute URL string —— 默认无跳转
events.backgroundColor?: CSS color string —— 默认主题色
events.borderColor?: CSS color string —— 默认跟随 backgroundColor
events.textColor?: CSS color string —— 默认主题对比色

schema.initialDate?: ISO-8601 date string —— 默认今天

fork_note: @fullcalendar/core@7.0.1 的发布说明为 Core Types,其 index.js 只打印“should not be imported directly”,没有 Calendar 构造器或视图实现。必须另建并探测 @fullcalendar/web-component@7.0.1 等可渲染 upstream,或做一个组合视图封装后再升为可消费条目;禁止偷偷借用 v6 API 或虚构 boot。

isolation.evidence: import 仅跑 console.log('should not be imported directly');包无 Calendar 构造/渲染器,无法在任何地方挂载
